title: QuantumEdge Acquisition
description: Due diligence on acquiring a Series B quantum computing software startup.

input_data.content: QuantumEdge has developed a proprietary error-correction algorithm for NISQ computers. Asking price is $150M. They claim a $2B TAM by 2030 but currently have only 3 enterprise pilots and a $1.2M burn rate. Tech stack is C++ and Python.

title: MediChain Series A
description: Evaluate investment in blockchain-based healthcare records startup.

input_data.content: MediChain aims to put all patient EHRs on a public ledger. Seeking $10M at a $40M valuation. The founder has a background in crypto but no healthcare experience. They plan to monetize by selling anonymized data to pharma.
